programme.desc: S1 E21 Single mother Dr. Noyonika helps pop star sensation Ishaan regain his voice, to the delight of her daughter. But tensions rise as they fall for each other.
programme.title: Sairaab

programme.desc: S1 E74 Virat is an IPS officer who loves Pakhi deeply. However, things become complicated when he has to let go of his love, Pakhi, and marry Sai.
programme.title: Ghum Hai Kisikey Pyaar Meiin

programme.desc: S1 E55 Kokila commands Ahem to do a ritual with Gopi while Jigar tells Rashi that he holds Ahem in high regard. Afterwards, Gopi and Baa's strong connection makes Rashi uncomfortable.
programme.title: Saath Nibhaana Saathiya

programme.desc: S1 E197 Dr Abhimanyu, a misogamist, finds himself getting attracted to Akshara, Kartik and Naira's daughter. Things take a tricky turn when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, falls in love with him.
programme.title: Yeh Rishta Kya Kehlata Hai

programme.desc: S2 E329 Tulsi Virani sets the example of an ideal bahu, and in time steps up to be a righteous matriarch. Watch her traverse the intricacies of a large family.
programme.title: Kyunki Saas Bhi Kabhi Bahu Thi

programme.desc: S1 E2057 Anupamaa sacrifices her personal ambitions to dedicate her life to her family. However, she eventually decides to live on her own terms after failing to receive credit for her many trials.
programme.title: Anupamaa

programme.desc: S1 E64 A reserved businessman who avoids romance crosses paths with an artist haunted by a bitter past, leaving the prospect of a budding romance hanging in the balance.
programme.title: Oh Humnava Tum Dena Saath Mera

programme.title: Udne Ki Aasha
